brand.tagline: The SaaS platform to run your pharmacy from the checkout to compliance.
brand.region: Built for modern pharmacies — cloud, multi-user, ready for Africa and beyond.

n1.title: One tool
n1.text: Sales, inventory, patients, purchasing, and finance in one unified interface.

n2.title: Secure multi-tenant
n2.text: Dedicated space per pharmacy, roles and permissions, full action traceability.

n3.title: Built to scale
n3.text: From point of sale to supply chain and decision-ready reporting.

clientJourney.subtitle: From onboarding to loyalty: a clear path for your team and your patients.

s1.title: Get started in minutes
s1.text: Sign up, space provisioning, and secure sign-in. Your team uses its dedicated subdomain.

s2.title: Configure the pharmacy
s2.text: Settings, users, document templates, sequences — adapt the platform to your organization.

s3.title: Run day-to-day operations
s3.text: Check out at the POS, manage inventory, prescriptions, and deliveries from one ecosystem.

s4.title: Steer and retain
s4.text: Dashboards, reports, loyalty, and notifications to engage patients and protect margin.

daily.label: Daily execution
daily.intro: Everything that happens at the counter and in the back office, in real time.

care.label: Patients & care
care.intro: Patient records, prescriptions, and vaccination tracking in one place.

supply.label: Supply chain
supply.intro: From purchase request to goods receipt.

b2b.label: B2B & distribution
b2b.intro: Partners, orders, credit, and integrations to run your B2B flows.

finance.label: Finance, insurance & billing
finance.intro: Collections, operational accounting, and third-party payment.

distribution.label: Distribution & service
distribution.intro: Extend your pharmacy beyond the counter.

org.label: Team & platform
org.intro: SaaS governance: users, documents, and subscription.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Key metrics, shortcuts to modules, and a concise view of pharmacy activity.
dashboard.outcome1: Quick read on volumes and alerts

pos.title: Point of sale
pos.description: Front-desk sales, basket, discounts, and a smooth experience to shorten queues.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Product catalog, movements, reorder suggestions, and stock levels to limit waste and stockouts.

patients.title: Patients
patients.description: Patient files and interaction history to support dispensing and continuity of care.

prescriptions.title: Prescriptions
prescriptions.description: Capture and track prescriptions to secure the path from prescription to delivery.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Manage audits, controls and compliance documents to meet regulatory requirements.

vaccination.title: Vaccination
vaccination.description: Track vaccinations delivered in-store for compliance and patient follow-up.

cold-chain.title: Cold chain
cold-chain.description: Monitor equipment, readings, thresholds, and alerts to secure sensitive products and prove compliance.

compounding.title: Compounding
compounding.description: Manage formulas, batch production, checks, and documentation to structure compounding operations.

teleconsultation.title: Teleconsultation
teleconsultation.description: Video/audio/chat sessions, consultation notes, and continuity of the patient journey (subject to local regulations).

ai.title: Artificial intelligence
ai.description: Smart assistant, model registry, and inference traceability to support dispensing and steering.
ai.planNote: Enabled depending on plan and configuration.

partners.title: B2B partners
partners.description: Centralize partners (B2B customers, wholesalers, distributors) with contacts, addresses, and payment terms.

sales-orders-b2b.title: B2B orders
sales-orders-b2b.description: End-to-end workflow: quotes, orders, stock allocation, picking, shipping, invoicing, and payment.

credit-control.title: Credit control
credit-control.description: Credit accounts, real-time checks, risk scoring, and collections to reduce unpaid invoices.

returns-rma.title: Returns & RMA
returns-rma.description: Return authorizations (RMA), quality inspection, actions (credit/refund/replacement), and full traceability.

commercial-terms.title: Commercial terms
commercial-terms.description: Price lists, discount rules, promotions, and rebates to protect margin and standardize policies.

b2b-integrations.title: B2B integrations
b2b-integrations.description: Partner connectivity (API/EDI), catalog/price/order sync, and exchange monitoring.

b2b-governance.title: B2B governance
b2b-governance.description: Contracts, SLAs, approval workflows, and compliance to secure B2B transactions.

b2b-dashboard.title: B2B dashboard
b2b-dashboard.description: B2B KPIs: volumes, OTIF, margin per customer, DSO, and trends to act quickly.

ap-matching.title: AP Matching
ap-matching.description: Automate supplier invoice, purchase order, and goods receipt matching to reduce discrepancies.

b2b-async.title: B2B async jobs
b2b-async.description: Run asynchronous B2B flows with retries, monitoring, and error diagnostics.

pricing-desk.title: Pricing Desk
pricing-desk.description: Define B2B pricing policies with margin guardrails and exception approvals.

credit-desk.title: Credit Desk
credit-desk.description: Monitor credit limits, exposure, and override requests to secure B2B sales.

traceability.title: Advanced traceability
traceability.description: Enhanced traceability trail (batches, evidence, verification) to secure product origin and movements.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Centralize partners, terms, and foundations to move into ordering.

supply-chain.title: Supply chain
supply-chain.description: Purchase requests, POs, GRNs, supplier quotes, and inbound flow management.

billing-ops.title: Billing (operations)
billing-ops.description: Run quotes, invoices, credit notes, due dates, reminders, and payment/accounting reconciliation.
billing-ops.outcome1: Better receivables control with fewer discrepancies

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Unify cash/card/mobile money payments, proofs, webhooks, refunds, and reconciliation.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: Internationalized accounting engine: dynamic chart of accounts, posting rules, analytics, taxes, periods, and compliance controls.
accounting.outcome0: Automate postings with strong governance and auditability
accounting.outcome1: Drive finance and analytic performance per tenant

e-invoice.title: E-invoicing
e-invoice.description: Generate, submit, track, and correct e-invoices with fiscal auditability and retry/rejection handling.
e-invoice.planNote: May depend on plan or entitlements.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: Manage insurers, claims, reimbursement statuses, and reconciliation to reduce rejects and delays.

delivery.title: Deliveries
delivery.description: Manage deliveries for a structured home service and order tracking.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Framework for pharmacy quality requirements: procedures, controls, and monitoring.

business-audit.title: Business journal & audit
business-audit.description: Business event logging for internal audit, compliance, and investigation.

inventory-recalls.title: Batch recalls
inventory-recalls.description: Launch and track recall campaigns to isolate impacted batches quickly.

controlled-substances.title: Controlled substances
controlled-substances.description: Track sensitive product movements with stronger validations and secured logs.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Analyze activity to find margin and sell-through levers.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Business and financial reports for management and local obligations.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.description: Retain patients with points / perks aligned with your commercial strategy.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Inform staff and patients about important events (stock, orders, reminders).

hr.title: Human resources
hr.description: HR management for the pharmacy tied to access and ways of working.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: General settings, document sequences, templates, and preferences to fit the system to your pharmacy.

role-security.title: Roles & security
role-security.description: Control access by role and permission to secure sensitive operations.

saas-billing.title: Subscription & platform billing
saas-billing.description: SaaS subscription management, plan upgrades, and billing sync based on your offer.
